name: Chicken Elegante`
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap each chicken breast in a slice of ham and tightly wrap with a thin slice of bacon to hold the ham in place. Secure with a toothpick if necessary.
2. Blend sour cream and soup (do not dilute soup) together and pour over the chicken breasts.
3. Bake seam side down at 350°F for 40 minutes, or until cooked through.
4. Remove the chicken from the oven and set aside with the sauce.
5. Cut the puff pastry into six rectangles. The pastry is folded in thirds, so cut vertically to get three pieces per package.
6. Place a chicken breast onto the bottom half of the pastry. Fold over the top and crimp to seal, creating a neat square packet.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20-30 minutes, or until puffed and golden.
8. Serve hot with warmed sauce poured over.
